vBRIEFInfo.description: Single canonical vocabulary surface for v0.20 terms, 13 required entries, cross-refs from vbrief.md/README/UPGRADING, content test, strict scope cap.

plan.title: v0.20.0 GA blocker: add deft/glossary.md with v0.20 canonical vocabulary

narratives.Problem: v0.20 introduces new vocabulary (Scope vBRIEF, lifecycle folder, plan-level narrative, filename stem, cross-scope dependency, Exit Commands, origin provenance, canonical narrative key, preparatory strategy, spec-generating strategy, rendered export, source of truth) defined inline or ambiguously across docs. Drift risk is real; post-GA issue filers use inconsistent terms.
narratives.Action: Create deft/glossary.md with RFC2119 legend and exactly 13 required entries (plus optional chaining gate / acceptance gate). Each entry: bold term, 1-2 sentence definition, cross-link to authoritative doc/section. Add cross-reference to deft/glossary.md from vbrief/vbrief.md, README.md Skills section, and UPGRADING.md v0.20 section. File length must stay under 150 lines. Alphabetical ordering allowed but not required.
narratives.Test: tests/content/test_glossary.py asserts file exists, contains all 13 required term labels exactly, and total line count under 150. verify:links passes with new cross-refs.
narratives.Outcome: Single canonical vocabulary reference exists. Touched docs point at it. Terminology drift risk eliminated at the source.

items.title: Create deft/glossary.md with RFC2119 legend + 13 required terms
Add one-line pointer in README.md Skills/Contracts/Docs section
Reference deft/glossary.md in UPGRADING.md v0.20 section
Run verify:links and confirm no broken internal links
